message:
Merge PR #2121: fix: resolve golangci-lint errors in daemon and handoff packages

Wraps ignored errors, removes unused db parameter from exportTableToJsonl,
adds //nolint:gosec annotations for internal SQL queries.
Conflict in doctor_dog.go resolved (function was removed in prior refactor).

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2121
Author: seanbearden

Co-authored-by: gastown/crew/bear <72461227+seanbearden@users.noreply.github.com>
